atomic_library.description: Move the robot's end-effector to the object's location for interaction
pre_conditions: Object is within the robot's operational space
post_conditions: End-effector is positioned near the object

atomic_library.description: Close the robot's gripper to securely hold the object
pre_conditions: Object is within the gripper's graspable range
End-effector is properly aligned with the object
post_conditions: Object is securely held by the gripper
Object is lifted off its initial surface

atomic_library.description: Raise the object vertically to clear its initial position
pre_conditions: Object is securely held by the gripper
post_conditions: Object is lifted to a safe height

atomic_library.description: Move the object downward to the target location
pre_conditions: Object is held by the gripper
Target location is accessible and clear
post_conditions: Object is positioned over the target location
Object is ready to be released

atomic_library.description: Open the gripper to release the object at the target location
pre_conditions: Object is held by the gripper
Target location is stable and clear
post_conditions: Object is released and supported by the target location
Gripper is open and no longer holding the object

atomic_library.description: Actuate the mechanism to open a container or appliance door
pre_conditions: End-effector is positioned to interact with the container's opening mechanism

atomic_library.description: Actuate the mechanism to close a container or appliance door
pre_conditions: End-effector is positioned to interact with the container's closing mechanism

atomic_library.description: Transport an object from one location to another while maintaining a secure grip
pre_conditions: Object is securely held by the end-effector
Path between source and target locations is clear
post_conditions: Object is positioned over the target location
Object is ready to be placed
